name: clinical-research-assistant
description: Clinical research assistant for the full research-to-publication pipeline: orchestrated registry/outcomes analysis, pre-registered statistics with primary/secondary/sensitivity checkpoints, publication-quality figures, and IMRAD manuscript drafting. Orchestrates science-superpowers (rigor) and K-Dense scientific-skills + BioMedAgent (execution) underneath.

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrated clinical-research analysis and manuscript pipeline for surgical/clinical researchers
interface.longDescription: Clinical Research Assistant (CRA) orchestrates the full research-to-publication workflow: project initialization, pre-design literature recon, pre-registered analysis with primary / secondary / sensitivity checkpoints and PI approval gates, publication-quality figures, and IMRAD manuscript drafting with house formatting standards. CRA is the orchestrator (the brain) and delegates rigor to science-superpowers (pre-registration, result verification, red-team review) and execution to K-Dense scientific-skills and BioMedAgent.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a new clinical research project.
Run a registry analysis and draft the manuscript.
